description_long: This is a rectangular mattress with a muted gray color and a subtle, repetitive circular tufted pattern across its entire upper surface. The mattress appears to be of standard thickness, supported by a simple, dark-colored metal frame with four straight legs. The surface texture is quilted, giving it a slightly raised and cushioned appearance, while the edges are defined by a continuous border trim. There are no visible brand labels, tags, or stickers on any side of the mattress. The overall look is utilitarian and slightly worn, suitable for use in an urban environment such as a discarded item on a sidewalk or in a public park.
description: A gray, tufted mattress with a quilted surface and dark metal frame, featuring a continuous border trim and no visible branding or tags.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular mattress with a quilted, circular tufted pattern and two visible metal legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mattress's length, quilted surface, and the full width of the metal frame with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the tufted pattern and the back two metal legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the mattress's length and the metal frame's structure.
attribute_pattern_design: Repetitive circular tufted pattern arranged in a grid across the quilted surface.
attribute_edge_piping: Continuous, slightly raised border trim in a matching gray color running around the mattress edges.
